## Description
Provide a summary of the changes made and the problem being solved.

## Type of Change
- [ ] New plugin (Loader, VectorStore, Retriever, Reranker, LLM, Formatter)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] Refactoring or performance optimization
- [ ] Documentation update

## Related Issues
Closes #

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the repository's PEP 8 code style guidelines.
- [ ] I have added type hints and docstrings for all new functions/classes.
- [ ] I have added unit tests under `tests/` covering my changes.
- [ ] All unit tests pass locally (`python -m pytest`).
